activeStatusDesc: Your link, traffic, and onboarding entry are ready. Next, connect with the client you actually use.
announcementFallback: If there is no new notice, this area stays quiet.
confirmResetSubscription: Are you sure you want to reset your subscription?
guideCardFallback: Download the client first, then follow the in-site guide to finish setup.
guideEmptyDesc: You can confirm supported clients on the plan page first and come back later.
guideSectionDesc: Pick your client first, then connect with the guide below.
inactiveStatusDesc: Open your first plan first. The guides and invite entry are already lined up below.
inviteActionDesc: Full records, invite details, and later withdrawals stay on the invite page. This block keeps the key actions close.
inviteMainDesc: Share your dedicated entry. When someone registers and purchases successfully, the commission returns to your account.
inviteMainTitle: Invite friends and grow with commission
inviteSectionDesc: Keep your invite code and invite link in one place so sharing and tracking stay easy.
overviewSubtitle: Keep account status, subscription progress, and action entries in one place after sign-in.
promoDescription: We put the better offer in front first. If you buy now, you keep the current price window.
promoNoticeDescription: You did not use it right away, so we left the entry on the right. The timer still keeps moving.
promoNoticeTitle: The limited offer is still reserved
scanHint: Scan with Shadowrocket, Clash, Stash, or similar clients for fast import.
subscriptionAccessDesc: Keep your active subscription entry here. Copy, scan, and quick import are already prepared.
subscriptionEmptyDesc: Purchase a plan first and the system will generate your dedicated link and QR code automatically.
